meaning: n.<美>学士学位,在毕业典礼上对毕业班所作的告别讲话
examples: It's part of our International Baccalaureate Program, and it's community service.
At the boarding school in Shanghai, the girls attend a class endorsed by the International Baccalaureate.
Additionally, post-baccalaureate studies provide specialization and internships provide work experience.
Skills minister Matthew Hancock said the technical baccalaureate would be a "mark of achievement".
There are also equivalents for Scottish Highers, the International Baccalaureate, BTECs and Cambridge pre-Us.
